description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, fenced yard featuring a mix of grass, trees, and outdoor amenities such as a swing set and a small pool. The building is primarily constructed from light-colored materials, with large windows and sliding glass doors that allow for ample natural light. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, and a car is parked outside. The backyard is landscaped with palm trees, a seating area, and a play area, creating a family-friendly environment. The bungalow has two visible stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, giving it a stepped appearance. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open outdoor space and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, swing set, and palm trees. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes a driveway with a garage.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front and side of the bungalow, showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, and a portion of the landscaped backyard.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the expansive backyard with a pool, swing set, palm trees, and a seating area, as well as the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: This side view focuses on the garage, driveway, and the side entrance, with the backyard and outdoor amenities visible in the background.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the side of the bungalow, the driveway, and the full extent of the fenced yard with outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
